evals.prompt: Implement unit tests for OrderService per task-012-unit-order-service.md after backend task-007 shipped.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads OrderService and existing tests, adds tests/Unit/Modules/Orders/OrderServiceTest.php with mocks, runs phpunit in Docker with --testdox --stop-on-failure --stop-on-error and 120s timeout.

evals.prompt: Add cross-tenant P0 tests for OrdersController — user from company A must not read company B order.
evals.expected_output: Agent adds Feature test with factories, asserts 403/404 not 200, runs filtered phpunit in Docker with mandatory flags and timeout.

evals.prompt: Greenfield Laravel monorepo has backend/ with app code but zero tests/ folder. Implement first unit test for LoginFormRequest.
evals.expected_output: Agent bootstraps backend/phpunit.xml and tests/ tree, does not touch frontend, then adds FormRequest unit test and runs phpunit in Docker with mandatory flags.

evals.prompt: PHPUnit run has been spinning for 3 minutes in docker exec.
evals.expected_output: Agent enforces timeout 120 wrapper, aborts hung run, reports dead test execution without silent retry.
